name: Hands Holding Product
description: Реалистичная рука держит товар. Премиум лайфстайл. Фокус на товаре. Мягкое размытие фона.
prompt_prefix: Premium lifestyle product photography. Realistic human hand holding the product naturally. Focus remains on the product — hand is secondary. Natural skin texture, no airbrush. Soft blurred background. Magazine editorial quality. Ultra realistic. 8K. Commercial product photography.
composition: Hand holding product in center frame, shallow DOF, soft bokeh background
lighting: Soft window light, product well-lit, subtle shadow from hand
